items.title: SpaceX aborts Starship Flight 13 launch attempt
items.summary: SpaceX aborted the launch of its latest Starship test flight July 16 when some of the vehicle’s engines failed to ignite.

items.title: 2 defense tech companies sue US Navy after losing out on MUSV program
items.summary: Two defense tech companies sued the U.S. government, alleging they were unfairly excluded from the Navy's Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel program.

items.title: Nature study identifies a new way to spot nuclear weapons in orbit
items.summary: NEW YORK — A study published last week in Nature Astronomy has proposed a new satellite design and technique to detect thermonuclear warheads in space. Funded in part by the […]

items.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
items.summary: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.

items.title: UK Unveils Storm Fighter Loyal Wingman Program
items.summary: The new initiative revives Britain’s collaborative combat aircraft ambitions and is intended to fly alongside Typhoon, F-35, and the future Tempest.

items.title: Navy Wants 1,000 Mile Combat Radius For Carrier Based Tactical Drone Fleets
items.summary: The range requirement offers the first real window into the capabilities the Navy wants for its future carrier-based tactical drone fleets.

items.title: Canada to join GCAP next-gen fighter program as observer: Reports
items.summary: While Ottawa previously confirmed its first order for 16 Lockheed Martin F-35s, it has spent the last year reviewing its future fighter jet fleet options.

items.title: Saab to supply sensors and combat systems for new German warships after F126 scrapped
items.summary: Swedish defense firm Saab has secured an 8.7 billion kronor ($900 million) contract to supply combat systems and sensors for the German Navy’s MEKO ships.

items.title: Networked for the fight: Army aviation’s next advantage
items.summary: [Sponsored] As operating environments grow more complex, Link 16 provides instantaneous, mission-wide connectivity to ensure no aircraft flies alone.

items.title: The Download: OpenAI unveils GPT-Red and heat pumps rise in the US
items.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI…
